meaning: n.<法>全体,[音]合唱曲,全体演出者
examples: Mr. Titterton is chairman of the Omega Ensemble but has been the group's official page turner for the past four years.
I just wonder if the jazz ensemble knew what was going to happen.
Originally we were booked in one of the rehearsal rooms in the music building, but then we switched with the jazz ensemble.
The ensemble of buildings at Greenwich symbolize English artistic and scientific endeavour in the 17th and 18th centuries.
People can book a 20-minute domestic concert by the members of the contemporary ensemble Phace.
